questions.question: What is the man in the white coat doing in this clip?
questions.answer_key: Speaking or presenting, gesturing with his hand while talking
questions.rationale: Identifies main subject and primary action central to the clip

questions.question: What type of setting or location is shown in the clip?
questions.answer_key: A laboratory or food science facility with equipment and machinery
questions.rationale: Establishes context and environment essential for understanding the scene

questions.question: What is visible on the table or work surface behind the man?
questions.answer_key: An aquarium or tank with red contents, and various laboratory equipment
questions.rationale: Describes key objects in the setting relevant to food/cooking context

questions.question: What does the man's attire suggest about his role?
questions.answer_key: He is a professional, likely a chef, scientist, or food industry expert
questions.rationale: Helps establish credibility and expertise of the main speaker

questions.question: What visible text or branding appears on the man's clothing?
questions.answer_key: A logo or text on his white coat indicating his organization or company
questions.rationale: Identifies institutional affiliation relevant to understanding the presentation context
